title: AFKStation
description: Lightweight AFK mod that makes idle time cinematic, hides chat on request, shows an AFK timer, caps FPS, and instantly returns to gameplay when you move.
body:
![AFKStation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85223e053b84762d29ee7219cbf20ab23ec221d5.png)

# AFK Station - Make idle time cinematic!

**AFK Station** turns idle moments into smooth cinematic camera shots, so your world still looks alive while you are away.  
Now available on **Fabric** and **Forge** for **Minecraft 1.21.11**. **Quilt** and **NeoForge** are planned. Client-side only.

## ✨ Features
- **Cinematic AFK camera** with 5 styles:
  - Angle
  - Orbit
  - Halo
  - Spiral
  - Isometric
- **Smooth camera motion** with safe framing and ground clearance
- **Optional close-up framing** for tighter AFK shots
- **AFK timer HUD** with:
  - title and timer toggles
  - scale controls
  - top/bottom/center/custom positions
- **Automatic AFK detection** based on movement, mouse, hotbar, and key input
- **AFK countdown** before activation
- **Optional chat hiding** while AFK
- **AFK FPS cap** to reduce resource usage while idle
- **Optional AFK volume reduction**
- **Warning sound** before AFK starts
- **Clean in-game settings menu**
- **Client-side only**: no server install required

## ⌨️ Default keybinds
- **N**: Toggle AFK Station
- **M**: Open settings
- **B**: Force AFK on/off
- **V**: Switch camera style

*Category: **AFK Station**. All keybinds are remappable.*

## 🔧 Requirements
- **Minecraft**: 1.21.11
- **Loaders**:
  - Fabric Loader + Fabric API
  - Forge
  - Quilt *(planned)*
  - NeoForge
- **Java**: 21+
- **Environment**: Client-only

## ⚙️ Default settings
- **AFK timeout**: 15 seconds
- **AFK countdown**: 5 seconds
- **AFK FPS cap**: 30
- **AFK FOV**: 30
- **Camera**: enabled
- **HUD**: enabled
- **HUD anchor**: Top Right
- **Warning sound**: enabled
- **Chat hide**: disabled by default
- **AFK volume reduction**: disabled by default

## 📖 Usage
1. Press `M` to open the settings menu.
2. Configure AFK delay, countdown, FPS cap, FOV, camera style, HUD position, audio, and chat behavior.
3. Wait for AFK to activate automatically, or press `B` to force it manually.
4. Move, look around, or press input keys to instantly leave AFK mode.
